title: Rolson Impact Driver Set 29 Pieces: Various Driver Fitting and Sizes inc nut Spinners in Storage case 30326
features: SL6, PH2, PH2, PH2, PZ2, PZ2, PZ2, T15, T20, T25
11pc x 50mm SL5, SL6, PH1, PH2, PH2, PZ1, PZ2, PZ2, PZ3, T20, T25
¼”” Dr to ⅜”” socket adaptor
description: A versatile impact driver bit set that contains 29 different fittings including many of the most used in carpentry, building,automotive and general DIY. It comes in a tough storage case with each bit presented for fast and easy access. The set comes in three different lengths 25,50 and 75mm with an adaptor and 4 nut spinners. This has you covered for most of your jobs in one compact and strong case which measures 17 x 10 x 4cm.

specifications_table.Compatible fastener range: ‎Screws, bolts, and nuts of various sizes and drive types (Slotted, Phillips, Pozidriv, Torx)
